message:
Dynamically import BeadsView with ssr:false to prevent SSR crashes

BeadsView depends on browser-only APIs (sql-wasm via WebAssembly, force-graph
via canvas/WebGL) that are unavailable during Next.js server-side rendering.
A static import caused the build to attempt SSR of these APIs, leading to
hydration mismatches or outright crashes.

Switched to next/dynamic with ssr:false so the component only loads on the
client. Added a loading placeholder that matches the component's visual
container (dark rounded panel with a green spinning ring) to prevent layout
shift while the ~400KB of WASM and graph libraries load asynchronously.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
